---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for Blackreach
labels: enhancement
---

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

A clear description of the problem or limitation you are experiencing. For example: "I am trying to do X but there is no way to Y."

## Describe the Solution You Would Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any API or CLI changes you envision.

## Alternatives You Have Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have tried or considered. Why don't they fully solve the problem?

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the feature. Links to similar functionality in other projects are welcome.
